content: Manchester United forward Amad scored a late winner to give Ivory Coast a shock 2-1 victory over a much-changed France in their World Cup warmup match in Nantes.

zh.summary: 曼联球员阿马德攻入晚期进球，在世界杯热身赛中为象牙海岸带来2:1的惊人胜利，击败了轮换阵容的法国队。

title: Japan ditches pre-WC training site over poor pitch...
summary: Japan changed its World Cup training venue in Monterrey after players encountered an uneven pitch with patches of dirt at their original facility.
content: Japan has changed practice venues in Monterrey ahead of the World Cup after players encountered an uneven pitch marred by patches of dirt at their original training ground.

zh.title: 日本因球场状况不佳放弃世界杯前训练基地
zh.summary: 日本球员在原训练设施遇到不平整场地和泥土补丁后，改变了在蒙特雷的世界杯训练场所。

title: Mexico rout Serbia in festive final WCup warmup
summary: Mexico defeated Serbia 5-1 in front of a home crowd in their final World Cup warm-up match, one week before their tournament opener against South Africa.
content: In front of a roaring home crowd, Mexico wrapped up their World Cup warmups on Thursday with a dominant 5-1 victory over Serbia, exactly one week before their tournament opener against South Africa.

zh.title: 墨西哥在欢快的最后世界杯热身赛中大胜塞尔维亚
zh.summary: 墨西哥在主场球迷面前以5:1击败塞尔维亚，这是他们在世界杯首场对阵南非前一周的最后一场热身赛。

title: Madrid's Pérez vows $174M Galactico bid if elected...
summary: Real Madrid president candidate Florentino Pérez pledged to pursue a €150 million marquee 'Galáctico' signing this summer if elected in Sunday's presidential election.
content: Florentino Pérez promised to bid for a $174 million (€150 million) "Galáctico" player this summer as he tries to win Sunday's presidential elections at Real Madrid.

zh.title: 皇马佩雷斯承诺如当选将进行1.74亿美元的银河战舰签约
zh.summary: 皇家马德里主席候选人弗洛伦蒂诺·佩雷斯承诺，如果在周日的主席选举中当选，他将在今年夏天进行1.5亿欧元的标志性"银河战舰"签约。

title: Sources: Silva set to replace Mourinho at Benfica
summary: Benfica have agreed to appoint Marco Silva as head coach to replace José Mourinho, according to ESPN sources.
content: Benfica have reached an agreement with Marco Silva to replace José Mourinho as head coach, sources told ESPN's Bruno Andrade.

zh.title: 消息人士：席尔瓦将接任本菲卡主帅，取代穆里尼奥

title: Swiss striker Embolo gets U.S. visa after hang-up
summary: Switzerland striker Breel Embolo received his U.S. visa Thursday after a two-day delay and is now cleared to travel to the FIFA World Cup.
content: Switzerland striker Breel Embolo received a visa Thursday and is headed to the FIFA World Cup, following a two-day delay in the authorization of his travel to the United States.
